title: selaginella flabellata
intro: Selaginella flabellata, also known as fan-leaved spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella flabellata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
